verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut mane transiit, pertransiit rex Israël.  Quia puer Israël, et dilexi eum ;  et ex Ægypto vocavi filium meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י נַ֥עַר יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וָאֹהֲבֵ֑הוּ וּמִמִּצְרַ֖יִם קָרָ֥אתִי לִבְנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: As the morning passeth, so hath the king of Israel passed away. Because Israel was a child, and I loved him: and I called my son out of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Israel nuori oli, pidin minä hänen rakkaana, ja minä kutsuin Egyptistä minun poikani.
verses.king_james: When Israel was a child, then I loved him, and called my son out of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocaverunt eos, sic abierunt a facie eorum ;  Baalim immolabant, et simulacris sacrificabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָרְא֖וּ לָהֶ֑ם כֵּ֚ן הָלְכ֣וּ מִפְּנֵיהֶ֔ם לַבְּעָלִ֣ים יְזַבֵּ֔חוּ וְלַפְּסִלִ֖ים יְקַטֵּרֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: As they called them, they went away from before their face: they offered victims to Baalim, and sacrificed to idols.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuin heitä nyt kutsutaan, niin he kääntyvät pois, ja uhraavat Baalimille, ja suitsuttavat kuville.
verses.king_james: As they called them, so they went from them: they sacrificed unto Baalim, and burned incense to graven images.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego quasi nutritius Ephraim :  portabam eos in brachiis meis,  et nescierunt quod curarem eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֤י תִרְגַּ֙לְתִּי֙ לְאֶפְרַ֔יִם קָחָ֖ם עַל־זְרוֹעֹתָ֑יו וְלֹ֥א יָדְע֖וּ כִּ֥י רְפָאתִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I was like a foster father to Ephraim, I carried them in my arms: and they knew not that I healed them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä opetin Ephraimin käymään, ja talutin häntä käsivarsista, vaan nyt ei he tahdo tietää, että minä heitä parantanut olen.
verses.king_james: I taught Ephraim also to go, taking them by their arms; but they knew not that I healed them.

verses.latin_vulgate: In funiculis Adam traham eos,  in vinculis caritatis ;  et ero eis quasi exaltans jugum super maxillas eorum,  et declinavi ad eum ut vesceretur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּחַבְלֵ֨י אָדָ֤ם אֶמְשְׁכֵם֙ בַּעֲבֹת֣וֹת אַהֲבָ֔ה וָאֶהְיֶ֥ה לָהֶ֛ם כִּמְרִ֥ימֵי עֹ֖ל עַ֣ל לְחֵיהֶ֑ם וְאַ֥ט אֵלָ֖יו אוֹכִֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will draw them with the cords of Adam, with the bands of love: and I will be to them as one that taketh off the yoke on their jaws: and I put his meat to him that he might eat.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä annoin heidän vetää ihmisen ijestä, ja käydä rakkauden ohjissa, ja minä autin heitä, otin ikeen heidän kaulastansa, ja annoin heille elatuksen.
verses.king_james: I drew them with cords of a man, with bands of love: and I was to them as they that take off the yoke on their jaws, and I laid meat unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non revertetur in terram Ægypti, et Assur ipse rex ejus,  quoniam noluerunt converti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א יָשׁוּב֙ אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם וְאַשּׁ֖וּר ה֣וּא מַלְכּ֑וֹ כִּ֥י מֵאֲנ֖וּ לָשֽׁוּב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall not return into the land of Egypt, but the Assyrian shall be his king: because they would not be converted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei heidän pidä palajaman Egyptin maalle, vaan Assur pitää heidän kuninkaansa oleman; sillä ei he tahdo itsiänsä kääntää.
verses.king_james: He shall not return into the land of Egypt, but the Assyrian shall be his king, because they refused to return.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cœpit gladius in civitatibus ejus,  et consumet electos ejus,  et comedet capita eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָלָ֥ה חֶ֙רֶב֙ בְּעָרָ֔יו וְכִלְּתָ֥ה בַדָּ֖יו וְאָכָ֑לָה מִֽמֹּעֲצ֖וֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sword hath begun in his cities, and it shall consume his chosen men, and shall devour their heads.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden pitää miekan tuleman heidän kaupunkinsa päälle, ja heidän salpansa tempaaman ylös, ja syömän ne, heidän neuvonsa tähden.
verses.king_james: And the sword shall abide on his cities, and shall consume his branches, and devour them, because of their own counsels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et populus meus pendebit ad reditum meum ;  jugum autem imponetur eis simul, quod non auferetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַמִּ֥י תְלוּאִ֖ים לִמְשׁוּבָתִ֑י וְאֶל־עַל֙ יִקְרָאֻ֔הוּ יַ֖חַד לֹ֥א יְרוֹמֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And my people shall long for my return: but a yoke shall be put upon them together, which shall not be taken off.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun kansani väsyy kääntymästä minun puoleeni; ehkä kuinka heille saarnattaisiin, niin ei kenkään hankitse kuulemaan.
verses.king_james: And my people are bent to backsliding from me: though they called them to the most High, none at all would exalt him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo dabo te, Ephraim ?  protegam te, Israël ?  Quomodo dabo te sicut Adama,  ponam te ut Seboim ?  Conversum est in me cor meum,  pariter conturbata est pœnitudo mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֞יךְ אֶתֶּנְךָ֣ אֶפְרַ֗יִם אֲמַגֶּנְךָ֙ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֵ֚יךְ אֶתֶּנְךָ֣ כְאַדְמָ֔ה אֲשִֽׂימְךָ֖ כִּצְבֹאיִ֑ם נֶהְפַּ֤ךְ עָלַי֙ לִבִּ֔י יַ֖חַד נִכְמְר֥וּ נִחוּמָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: How shall I deal with thee, O Ephraim, shall I protect thee, O Israel? how shall I make thee as Adama, shall I set thee as Seboim? my heart is turned within me, my repentance is stirred up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä minun pitää sinusta tekemän, Ephraim? Varjelenko minä sinua, Israel? Pitäiskö minun sinulle tekemän niinkuin Adamalle, ja asettaman sinun niinkuin Zeboimin? Mutta minun sydämelläni on toinen mieli, minun laupiuteni on ylen palava:
verses.king_james: How shall I give thee up, Ephraim? how shall I deliver thee, Israel? how shall I make thee as Admah? how shall I set thee as Zeboim? mine heart is turned within me, my repentings are kindled together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non faciam furorem iræ meæ ;  non convertar ut disperdam Ephraim,  quoniam Deus ego, et non homo ;  in medio tui sanctus,  et non ingrediar civitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א אֶֽעֱשֶׂה֙ חֲר֣וֹן אַפִּ֔י לֹ֥א אָשׁ֖וּב לְשַׁחֵ֣ת אֶפְרָ֑יִם כִּ֣י אֵ֤ל אָנֹכִי֙ וְלֹא־אִ֔ישׁ בְּקִרְבְּךָ֣ קָד֔וֹשׁ וְלֹ֥א אָב֖וֹא בְּעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will not execute the fierceness of my wrath: I will not return to destroy Ephraim: because I am God, and not man: the holy one in the midst of thee, and I will not enter into the city.
verses.finnish_biblia: Etten minä tee hirmuisen vihani jälkeen, enkä palaja Ephraimia kadottamaan; sillä minä olen Jumala, ja en ihminen, ja olen Pyhä teidän keskellänne, ja en tahdo tulla kaupunkiin.
verses.king_james: I will not execute the fierceness of mine anger, I will not return to destroy Ephraim: for I am God, and not man; the Holy One in the midst of thee: and I will not enter into the city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post Dominum ambulabunt ;  quasi leo rugiet,  quia ipse rugiet,  et formidabunt filii maris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַחֲרֵ֧י יְהֹוָ֛ה יֵלְכ֖וּ כְּאַרְיֵ֣ה יִשְׁאָ֑ג כִּֽי־ה֣וּא יִשְׁאַ֔ג וְיֶחֶרְד֥וּ בָנִ֖ים מִיָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall walk after the Lord, he shall roar as a lion: because he shall roar, and the children of the sea shall fear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin Herraa seurataan, ja hän on kiljuva niinkuin jalopeura; ja kuin hän kiljuu, niin ne peljästyvät, jotka lännessä ovat.
verses.king_james: They shall walk after the Lord: he shall roar like a lion: when he shall roar, then the children shall tremble from the west.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et avolabunt quasi avis ex Ægypto,  et quasi columba de terra Assyriorum :  et collocabo eos in domibus suis, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶחֶרְד֤וּ כְצִפּוֹר֙ מִמִּצְרַ֔יִם וּכְיוֹנָ֖ה מֵאֶ֣רֶץ אַשּׁ֑וּר וְהוֹשַׁבְתִּ֥ים עַל־בָּתֵּיהֶ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall fly away like a bird out of Egypt, and like a dove out of the land of the Assyrians: and I will place them in their own houses, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Egyptissä ne myös peljästyvät niinkuin lintu, ja ne Assurin maasta niinkuin kyhkyinen; ja minä tahdon heitä asettaa huoneisiinsa, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: They shall tremble as a bird out of Egypt, and as a dove out of the land of Assyria: and I will place them in their houses, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdedit me in negatione Ephraim,  et in dolo domus Israël ;  Judas autem testis descendit cum Deo,  et cum sanctis fidelis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סְבָבֻ֤נִֽי בְכַ֙חַשׁ֙ אֶפְרַ֔יִם וּבְמִרְמָ֖ה בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וִיהוּדָ֗ה עֹ֥ד רָד֙ עִם־אֵ֔ל וְעִם־קְדוֹשִׁ֖ים נֶאֱמָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ephraim hath compassed me about with denials, and the house of Israel with deceit: but Juda went down as a witness with God, and is faithful with the saints.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ephraimissa on joka paikassa valhe minua vastaan, ja Israelin huoneessa petos; mutta Juuda hallitsee vielä Jumalan kanssa, ja on uskollinen pyhäin kanssa.
verses.king_james: Ephraim compasseth me about with lies, and the house of Israel with deceit: but Judah yet ruleth with God, and is faithful with the saints.
